title: Hover Card
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Hover Card wrapper composed from the local Base UI Preview Card primitive, shadcn slot classes, local class canonicalization, deterministic delay and placement attributes, and local static examples.
distinguishes: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Hover Card wrapper composed from the local Base UI Preview Card primitive, shadcn slot classes, local class canonicalization, deterministic delay and placement attributes, and local static examples.

registry.reason: shadcn Hover Card composes the local Base UI Preview Card primitive.
shadcn Hover Card examples compose local Button class helpers for trigger demos.
shadcn Hover Card uses the local class composition helper.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native wrapper and examples.
Provides Effect Schema options used by the local wrapper.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin Base UI React primitive is replaced by the local Foldkit Base UI Preview Card implementation.
Origin RTL example dependency is replaced by local deterministic RTL labels in installable examples.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

examples.title: HoverCardDemo
examples.description: Basic Hover Card with local Button trigger classes and default bottom content placement.
examples.distinguishes: Basic Hover Card with local Button trigger classes and default bottom content placement.

examples.title: HoverCardSides
examples.description: Hover Card examples rendered across the supported physical sides.
examples.distinguishes: Hover Card examples rendered across the supported physical sides.

examples.title: HoverCardRtl
examples.description: RTL Hover Card examples with physical and logical side attributes.
examples.distinguishes: RTL Hover Card examples with physical and logical side attributes.

deviations.summary: The shadcn wrapper composes local Preview Card attributes instead of importing upstream Base UI React primitives.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source must not import React or upstream Base UI runtime packages.

deviations.summary: Examples use local Button classes and deterministic RTL labels instead of unavailable origin app dependencies.
deviations.rationale: The Hover Card slice preserves the relevant DOM, class, ARIA, and visual contracts without adding React or app-local language selector runtime dependencies.

deviations.summary: Delay and closeDelay are exposed as deterministic attributes and consumer-owned open-change facts.
deviations.rationale: Hover Card remains a pure Foldkit render helper and does not hide timers in installable view code.

deviations.summary: Positioner and content expose side, align, offset, collision, viewport, and arrow attributes without runtime DOM measurement or collision flipping.
deviations.rationale: Measured collision behavior belongs behind a shared measurement service, not inside the shadcn render helper.
